original_thesis: The 'make complex things learnable' stack. Reduces cognitive overhead so the thinker can engage with the actual problem instead of drowning in complexity.
what_this_stack_defeats: Information overload, expertise traps, complexity paralysis
notes: Thesis is accurate. CLT provides the theory; scaffolding implements it; boundaries scope it; curse-of-knowledge and expertise-reversal-effect identify when the approach backfires (experts need different treatment). Prerequisite chain CLT → scaffolding is embedded.
